response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical versatility and leadership in software development, but his experience is heavily focused on web, mobile, and embedded systems rather than JVM tooling, enterprise frameworks, or IDE internals. His Java experience is limited to older roles (e.g., robotic arms with Java), and there is no clear evidence of deep involvement with Spring, Kotlin, or JVM-specific tooling. His strengths lie more in general software engineering and system design, which may not fully align with the specialized requirements of this role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practices.
Proven ability to lead and architect complex systems across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded).
Experience in developer tooling, including MCP code generators and AI-agent infrastructure.
concerns: Limited direct experience with JVM tooling, IDE internals, or enterprise frameworks like Spring/Kotlin.
No clear evidence of working on large-scale JVM-based systems or application server integration.
Primary expertise in web and mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, Ember.js) rather than JVM ecosystems.
